name: BA New Portal Order Submitted
subject: New B2B Order {{ doc.name }} from {{ doc.buyer }}
message: A new B2B portal order {{ doc.name }} was submitted by {{ doc.buyer }} for {{ doc.get_formatted("total_amount") }}.

name: BA Portal Order Dispatched
subject: Your order {{ doc.name }} has been dispatched
message: Good news — your order {{ doc.name }} has been dispatched. You can track it any time from your buyer portal login.

name: BA Subscription Expiring Soon
subject: Subscription for {{ doc.buyer }} expires in 7 days
message: The {{ doc.plan }} subscription for buyer {{ doc.buyer }} expires on {{ doc.end_date }}. Reach out before it lapses.

name: BA Low Stock Alert
subject: Low/out of stock: {{ doc.item }} at {{ doc.warehouse }}
message: {{ doc.item }} is now Out of Stock in warehouse {{ doc.warehouse }}. Portal buyers will see this immediately.
